exceptions.reason: The latest @modelcontextprotocol/sdk release still constrains @hono/node-server to the vulnerable 1.x major. Workspace and container installs force the patched 2.x major, but npm does not apply dependency-package overrides when consumers install the published tarball.
exceptions.reachability: ssh-mcp-pro does not import @hono/node-server or Hono serve-static. Its HTTP entrypoints use the project's own Node HTTP implementation, so the affected Windows static-file path is not reachable in the supported application flow.
exceptions.removalCondition: Remove this exception as soon as @modelcontextprotocol/sdk accepts @hono/node-server >=2.0.5, or immediately if ssh-mcp-pro begins using the Hono Node adapter or serve-static.
